hook: Consistency creates safety, but over-availability can still flatten polarity if it is driven by anxiety.
body: The healthiest progression pairs steadiness with self-possession instead of turning commitment into constant fusion.

hook: Some men think proving devotion means removing all distance, rhythm, and individuality from the connection.
body: Closeness works better when both people remain whole, not merged into one schedule and mood system.

body: Being dependable while still maintaining your own routines often feels safer and more attractive than becoming perpetually on-call.
